title: cassia fastuosa var. fastuosa
intro: Cassia fastuosa var. fastuosa, also known as the Yellow Cassia, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Cassia fastuosa var. fastuosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and traditional medicine.
